content:
「请入座吧，守密人。一场精心排练的新剧就要上演了。」
「您将去到谁的身边？和谁一起欣赏舞台上无穷无尽的表演呢？」

在评论区留下您想入座的座位编号吧！
当木偶们在丝线的牵引中醒来，命运将让曾经消失的「银芯×200」返还于您~

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

"Pray, take your seat, Keeper. A new play, meticulously rehearsed, is about to begin."
"Whose company will you seek? And with whom shall you behold the stage's endless performance?"

Leave your chosen seat number in the comments below.
When the marionettes awaken at the tug of their silken threads, Fate shall return the lost "Silver × 200" unto you!
